import sys
from collections import defaultdict

def main():
    input = sys.stdin.read
    data = input().split()
    idx = 0
    N = int(data[idx])
    idx += 1
    Q = int(data[idx])
    idx += 1

    # Adjacency list
    adj = defaultdict(set)
    # Degree array
    degree = [0] * (N + 1)

    for _ in range(Q):
        query_type = data[idx]
        idx += 1
        if query_type == '1':
            u = int(data[idx])
            idx += 1
            v = int(data[idx])
            idx += 1
            # Add edge
            adj[u].add(v)
            adj[v].add(u)
            degree[u] += 1
            degree[v] += 1
        else:
            v = int(data[idx])
            idx += 1
            # Remove all edges connected to v
            for neighbor in adj[v]:
                adj[neighbor].discard(v)
                degree[neighbor] -= 1
            adj[v].clear()
            degree[v] = 0

        # Count isolated vertices
        isolated = sum(1 for i in range(1, N + 1) if degree[i] == 0)
        print(isolated)

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
